verdict: Moderate displacement risk due to increasing automation in design and construction tasks.

reasoning_steps.title: Routine Cognitive Tasks
reasoning_steps.body: Tasks 2, 4, and 10 involve preparing scale drawings or architectural designs, consulting with clients, and preparing contract documents. These tasks are heavily automated by computer-aided design tools and can be performed by AI systems.

reasoning_steps.title: Creative Judgment
reasoning_steps.body: Task 5 involves meeting with clients to review or discuss architectural drawings. While human judgment is still required in this task, it is not as critical as other tasks that require more complex decision-making.

reasoning_steps.title: Regulatory Moat
reasoning_steps.body: The regulatory moat for architects is relatively low due to the lack of licensure requirements and statutory liability. However, obtaining a license does provide some protection against AI displacement.

adjacent_careers.name: Interior Designer
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Both architects and interior designers work on the aesthetic aspects of building design, but interior designers focus more on the visual elements.

adjacent_careers.name: Urban Planner
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Urban planners work on the spatial planning and development of cities, which is related to architectural design but requires different skills.

recent_developments.headline: New AI-powered design tool for architects
recent_developments.impact: This new tool automates some of the routine design tasks, but human judgment is still required for complex decisions.

recent_developments.headline: Generative tools enter mainstream creative pipelines
recent_developments.impact: Studios and agencies use AI for ideation, layout, voice, and music drafts — finals still human-finished.

quotes.quote: I am utterly disgusted. This is an insult to life itself.
quotes.speaker: Hayao Miyazaki
quotes.title: Co-founder, Studio Ghibli

quotes.quote: AI is a tool. It will not replace artists. It will replace artists who do not learn to use AI as a tool.
quotes.speaker: Refik Anadol
quotes.title: Media artist

quotes.quote: Generative tools collapse the cost of producing a draft to near zero. The differentiator becomes taste, judgment, and knowing what is worth making at all.
quotes.speaker: John Maeda
quotes.title: Designer; VP of Design and AI, Microsoft
